description_long: This object is a small, rectangular drink carton with a pink color scheme and a white bendable straw protruding from the top. The front and back panels feature a cartoon character, possibly a pig, wearing a red scarf and a yellow hat, surrounded by a pink background and decorative elements. The top flaps are open, revealing the interior and the straw insertion point. The side panels display text in a stylized font, with one side showing a strawberry graphic, suggesting a fruity or strawberry-flavored beverage. The carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical for single-serve drink packaging, and is lightweight and portable. The overall design is playful and targeted towards a younger audience, with a focus on visual appeal and convenience.
description: A pink, rectangular drink carton with a white straw and cartoon character graphics, featuring playful designs and strawberry-themed elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cartoon character with a red scarf and yellow hat, and the straw emerging from the top.
description_view_1: Side view displays stylized text and a strawberry graphic, with the top flaps open and the straw visible.
description_view_2: Back view features a similar cartoon character graphic as the front, with some text above the character.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows more stylized text and a strawberry graphic, with the top flaps open.
attribute_flavor_indication: Strawberry graphic and pink color scheme suggest a strawberry flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, nutritional information is visible on the side panels in the form of a text block.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Cartoon character mascot on the front and back panels, wearing a red scarf and yellow hat.
